---
title: "The Rev. and Hon. Arthur Perceval"
---

## The Rev. and Hon. Arthur Perceval

**Dates:** (1799-1853)

### Description

Rector of East Horsley

### Biography

He was a pupil of Keble and the great friend and brother-in-law of Sir William Heathcote; he was the father of Fanny Perceval.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
